preferredDeck: Freed Desktop gets a broad stability pass across startup repair, WebKit memory pressure, dense Friends and Map rendering, Google Drive sync, and mobile PWA reading.
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes across reliability, performance, sync, and mobile PWA polish.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Mobile PWA polish balances the toolbar, settings, support, feed cards, and reader spacing.
Freed Desktop startup and renderer recovery are calmer under memory pressure and hidden-window states.
Dense Friends and Map surfaces now have explicit performance coverage and lighter rendering paths.
Google Drive sync, snapshots, RSS startup polling, and update state are more reliable.
editorialNotes: Manual production daily rollup for the May 6 replacement release train.
